prestazioni: Engine: N63B44T3 (4.4L twin-turbo V8) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos (1.06 A/R, 64mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675 Gen2** wastegates for 850whp on E85 with **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management, replacing the factory Bosch MEVD17.2.9.

Fuel System: **Fuel Injector Clinic 3100cc injectors** (side-feed, ethanol-compatible) with **Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger** (walbro 525lph + 450lph) and **AEM 400LPH inline pump** for E85 flex-fuel capability, supported by **Spool Performance billet fuel rails** and **ID1700x injectors** for secondary port injection.

Drivetrain & Cooling: **ZF 8HP76 Xtend+ transmission tune** with **Peloquin LSD** (40% lock) and **South Bend Stage 4 twin-disc clutch** (ceramic-metallic, 1200Nm torque capacity). **PWR Australia 4-core intercooler** (1200hp-rated) with **Mishimoto X7-specific aluminum radiator** and **CSF dual-row oil cooler** (part #8204) for N63 oil temps.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: **Prior Design PD-X7RS** carbon fiber widebody kit (50mm rear fender flares, 30mm front) with **Rocket Bunny X7 overfenders** (polyurethane, bolt-on) for 295/30/23 rear tire clearance on **HRE FF01** 23x12.5 ET25 wheels.

Aerodynamics: **Vorsteiner V-RT X7** carbon fiber front splitter (3-piece, adjustable) with **AC Schnitzer X7 rear diffuser** (carbon, 4x100mm exhaust cutouts) and **Eventuri X7 carbon fiber hood** (functional vents, 8kg weight reduction). **AWE Track Edition** quad-exit exhaust (3.5" tips, titanium valves) for N63 sound tuning.

Interior & Lighting: **Recaro SPG XL** front seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and **Macht Schnell X7 roll cage** (bolt-in, 4-point). **Lux H8 V4** angel eyes (8000K, switchback) with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** (5500K, DOT-approved) and **Oracle Lighting X7 dynamic RGB grille** (addressable, 16.8M colors).
